451.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he grabbed the ring of the door of the Kaaba and said: "I heard the Messenger of Allah دلوالله say: 'There is no prayer after Asr until the sun sets, and no prayer after Fajr until the sun rises — except in Makkah, except in Makkah.'"
451.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia memegang cincin pintu Kabah dan berkata: "Aku mendengar Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: 'Tidak ada shalat setelah Ashar hingga matahari terbenam, dan tidak ada shalat setelah Subuh hingga matahari terbit — kecuali di Makkah, kecuali di Makkah.'"

452.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man told him he could not perform deeds like those of the righteous. The Prophet دلوالله said to him: "You will be with those whom you love." Abu Dharr said: "Then I love Allah and His Messenger." And the Prophet دلوالله said three times: "You will be with those whom you love, O Abu Dharr."
452.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa seorang laki-laki memberitahunya bahwa ia tidak bisa beramal seperti orang-orang saleh. Nabi دلوالله bersabda kepadanya: "Kamu akan bersama orang yang kamu cintai." Abu Dharr berkata: "Maka aku mencintai Allah dan Rasul-Nya." Dan Nabi دلوالله bersabda tiga kali: "Kamu akan bersama orang yang kamu cintai, wahai Abu Dharr."

453.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said: "Whoever dies without associating anything with Allah will enter Paradise."
453.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Barang siapa meninggal tanpa menyekutukan sesuatu pun dengan Allah akan masuk surga."

454.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said: "There is no man who claims to belong to someone other than his own father while knowing it, except that he has committed disbelief. And whoever claims something that is not his is not of us and should prepare his seat in the Fire. And whoever calls a man a disbeliever or says 'Enemy of Allah' when he is not — it comes back on him."
454.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Tidak ada seorang laki-laki yang mengklaim berasal dari selain ayahnya sendiri sementara ia mengetahuinya, kecuali ia telah berbuat kufur. Dan barang siapa mengklaim sesuatu yang bukan miliknya bukan dari golongan kami dan hendaklah ia mempersiapkan tempatnya di Neraka. Dan barang siapa menyebut seseorang kafir atau berkata 'Musuh Allah' padahal tidak demikian — hal itu kembali kepada dirinya."

455.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "Whoever dies upon that will enter Paradise." He said: "Even if he committed adultery and theft?" He said: "Even if he committed adultery and theft." He said: "Even if he committed adultery and theft?" He said: "Even if he committed adultery and theft" — three times. Then on the fourth he said: "Despite Abu Dharr's nose." So Abu Dharr left trailing his garment, saying: "Even if Abu Dharr's nose is rubbed in the dust."
455.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Barang siapa meninggal atas hal itu akan masuk surga." Ia berkata: "Meskipun ia berzina dan mencuri?" Beliau bersabda: "Meskipun ia berzina dan mencuri." Ia berkata: "Meskipun ia berzina dan mencuri?" Beliau bersabda: "Meskipun ia berzina dan mencuri" — tiga kali. Kemudian pada yang keempat beliau bersabda: "Meskipun hidung Abu Dharr terusap tanah." Maka Abu Dharr pergi sambil menyeret pakaiannya, berkata: "Meskipun hidung Abu Dharr terusap tanah."

456.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "I heard the Messenger of Allah دلوالله say: 'There is no pair of Muslim parents who lose two or three children before they reach the age of accountability, except that they will enter Paradise by the abundance of Allah's mercy toward those children.'"
456.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku mendengar Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: 'Tidak ada sepasang orang tua Muslim yang kehilangan dua atau tiga anak sebelum mencapai usia akil baligh, kecuali mereka akan masuk surga karena kelimpahan rahmat Allah kepada anak-anak tersebut.'"

457.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he asked the Prophet دلوالله about the first mosque placed for people. He said: "Al-Masjid al-Haram." He asked: "Then Bayt al-Maqdis?" He asked: "How long between them?" He said: "Forty years. And wherever the prayer time finds you, pray, for it is a mosque."
457.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Nabi دلوالله tentang masjid pertama yang didirikan untuk umat manusia. Beliau bersabda: "Al-Masjidil Haram." Ia bertanya: "Kemudian Baitul Maqdis?" Ia bertanya: "Berapa lama antara keduanya?" Beliau bersabda: "Empat puluh tahun. Dan di mana pun waktu shalat menemuimu, shalatlah, karena itu adalah masjid."

458.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله mentioned the virtue of hearing and sight, then said: "In your intimate relations with your wife there is also charity." Abu Dharr said: "Is one of us rewarded for his desire?" He said: "Do you not see that if you placed it in something forbidden, would there not be sin for you?" He said: "Yes." He said: "Do you reckon with the evil and not reckon with the good?"
458.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله menyebutkan keutamaan pendengaran dan penglihatan, kemudian bersabda: "Dalam hubungan intimmu dengan istrimu juga terdapat sedekah." Abu Dharr berkata: "Apakah salah satu dari kami diberi pahala atas nafsunya?" Beliau bersabda: "Tidakkah kamu lihat bahwa jika kamu menempatkannya pada sesuatu yang haram, bukankah akan ada dosa bagimu?" Ia berkata: "Ya." Beliau bersabda: "Apakah kamu memperhitungkan yang buruk namun tidak memperhitungkan yang baik?"

459.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man saw him calling out to people. When asked what he was saying, Abu Dharr replied: "I said nothing to them except something they had already heard from their Prophet دلوالله." The man asked him about taking the stipend from the ruler. Abu Dharr said: "Take it, for there is good in it as long as there is good in it — but if it becomes a trial, leave it."
459.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa seorang laki-laki melihatnya berseru kepada orang-orang. Ketika ditanya apa yang ia katakan, Abu Dharr menjawab: "Aku tidak mengatakan sesuatu kepada mereka kecuali sesuatu yang sudah mereka dengar dari Nabi mereka دلوالله." Laki-laki itu bertanya tentang mengambil tunjangan dari penguasa. Abu Dharr berkata: "Ambillah, karena ada kebaikan di dalamnya selama ada kebaikan di dalamnya — tetapi jika menjadi ujian, tinggalkan."

460.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "The evil eye is real — by Allah's permission it can take a man to the edge of a cliff and make him fall off."
460.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Ain (mata jahat) itu nyata — dengan izin Allah ia dapat membawa seseorang ke tepi tebing dan membuatnya jatuh."

461.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله reported from his Lord: "O son of Adam, as long as you call upon Me and hope in Me, I will forgive you whatever you have done. O son of Adam, if you meet Me with sins filling the earth but you have not associated anything with Me, I will meet you with forgiveness filling the earth. O son of Adam, if you seek My forgiveness, I will forgive you regardless of the extent of your sins."
461.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله meriwayatkan dari Tuhannya: "Wahai putra Adam, selama kamu berdoa kepada-Ku dan berharap kepada-Ku, Aku akan mengampunimu atas apa pun yang telah kamu lakukan. Wahai putra Adam, jika kamu menemui-Ku dengan dosa yang memenuhi bumi tetapi kamu tidak menyekutukan-Ku dengan sesuatu pun, Aku akan menemui-Ku dengan ampunan yang memenuhi bumi. Wahai putra Adam, jika kamu memohon ampunan-Ku, Aku akan mengampunimu terlepas dari seberapa besar dosamu."

462.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "Every glorification is a charity, every praise is a charity, and in your intimate relations with your wife there is charity." They said: "O Messenger of Allah, will one of us be rewarded for satisfying his desire?" He said: "Do you not see that if he placed it in something forbidden, there would be sin for him? Likewise, if he places it in something lawful, there is reward."
462.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Setiap tasbih adalah sedekah, setiap pujian adalah sedekah, dan dalam hubungan intimmu dengan istrimu terdapat sedekah." Mereka bertanya: "Wahai Rasulullah, apakah salah seorang dari kami akan diberi pahala karena memuaskan nafsunya?" Beliau bersabda: "Tidakkah kamu lihat bahwa jika ia menempatkannya pada yang haram, ada dosa baginya? Demikian pula jika ia menempatkannya pada yang halal, ada pahala."

463.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "On every joint of a person there is due a charity every day the sun rises. Every glorification (Subhan Allah) is a charity, every praise (Alhamdulillah) is a charity, every declaration of oneness (La ilaha illallah) is a charity, every declaration of greatness (Allahu Akbar) is a charity, commanding good is a charity, forbidding evil is a charity, and two rak'ahs of Duha prayer suffice for all of that."
463.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Pada setiap sendi seseorang ada sedekah yang wajib setiap hari matahari terbit. Setiap tasbih (Subhanallah) adalah sedekah, setiap tahmid (Alhamdulillah) adalah sedekah, setiap tahlil (La ilaha illallah) adalah sedekah, setiap takbir (Allahu Akbar) adalah sedekah, memerintahkan kebaikan adalah sedekah, mencegah kemungkaran adalah sedekah, dan dua rakaat shalat Dhuha mencukupi semua itu."

464.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was asked whether the Messenger of Allah دلوالله used to shake hands when meeting people. He said: "He never met me but that he shook my hand. One day he sent for me when I was not in the house, and when I arrived and was told of his messenger, I found that it was too late."
464.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia ditanya apakah Rasulullah دلوالله biasa berjabat tangan ketika bertemu orang. Ia berkata: "Beliau tidak pernah menemuiku kecuali beliau berjabat tangan denganku. Suatu hari beliau mengutus orang kepadaku ketika aku tidak ada di rumah, dan ketika aku tiba dan diberi tahu tentang utusannya, aku mendapati sudah terlambat."

465.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he asked the Messenger of Allah دلوالله about a man who does good deeds and people love him for it. He said: "That is the immediate glad tidings for the believer."
465.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Rasulullah دلوالله tentang seorang laki-laki yang melakukan kebaikan dan orang-orang mencintainya karenanya. Beliau bersabda: "Itu adalah kabar gembira yang segera bagi orang mukmin."

466.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said to him: "O Abu Dharr, how will you be when you remain among people who delay the prayer past its time?" He said: "He told me: 'Pray the prayer at its proper time. If you find they have not prayed, then pray with them — but do not say 'I have already prayed' and stop praying.'"
466.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda kepadanya: "Wahai Abu Dharr, bagaimana keadaanmu ketika kamu tinggal di antara orang-orang yang menunda shalat dari waktunya?" Ia berkata: "Beliau memberitahuku: 'Shalatlah pada waktunya yang benar. Jika kamu mendapati mereka belum shalat, maka shalatlah bersama mereka — tetapi jangan katakan 'Aku sudah shalat' lalu berhenti shalat.'"

467.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله struck his thigh and said: "How will you be when you remain among people who delay the prayer?" Then he said: "Pray the prayer at its proper time. Then go — and if the congregation is already praying when you arrive at the mosque, pray with them."
467.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله menepuk pahanya dan berkata: "Bagaimana keadaanmu ketika kamu tinggal di antara orang-orang yang menunda shalat?" Kemudian beliau bersabda: "Shalatlah shalat pada waktunya yang benar. Kemudian pergilah — dan jika jemaah sudah shalat ketika kamu tiba di masjid, shalatlah bersama mereka."

468.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man had a silver hilt on his sword and Abu Dharr forbade him from it. He said: "The Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: 'Any person who stores gold or silver will be branded with it.' And he said: 'What about iron or lead?' He replied: 'Those are also among the things stored.' He said: 'What about what we use for something useful?' He said: 'I did not say that.' He said: 'What about silk?' He said: 'Whoever wears silk in this world will not wear it in the Hereafter.'"
468.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa seorang laki-laki memiliki gagang pedang dari perak dan Abu Dharr melarangnya. Ia berkata: "Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: 'Setiap orang yang menyimpan emas atau perak akan dicap dengannya.' Dan beliau bersabda: 'Bagaimana dengan besi atau timbal?' Beliau menjawab: 'Itu juga termasuk hal yang disimpan.' Beliau bersabda: 'Bagaimana dengan yang kami gunakan untuk sesuatu yang berguna?' Beliau bersabda: 'Aku tidak mengatakan itu.'"

469.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "There are three whom Allah will not speak to on the Day of Resurrection, will not look at them, will not purify them, and for them is a painful punishment: the one who gives and then reminds of his gift, the one who drags his lower garment, and the one who sells his goods with a false oath."
469.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Ada tiga yang Allah tidak akan berbicara kepada mereka pada Hari Kiamat, tidak akan melihat mereka, tidak akan menyucikan mereka, dan bagi mereka ada siksa yang pedih: orang yang memberi kemudian mengungkit pemberiannya, orang yang menyeret pakaian bawahnya, dan orang yang menjual barangnya dengan sumpah palsu."

470.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "Every glorification is a charity, every praise is a charity, commanding good is a charity, forbidding evil is a charity, and in your intimate relations with your wife there is charity." They asked: "Will one of us be rewarded for satisfying his desire?" He said: "Do you not see that if he placed it in something forbidden, would there not be sin? So likewise, if he places it in something lawful, there is reward."
470.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Setiap tasbih adalah sedekah, setiap tahmid adalah sedekah, memerintahkan kebaikan adalah sedekah, mencegah kemungkaran adalah sedekah, dan dalam hubungan intimmu dengan istrimu terdapat sedekah." Mereka bertanya: "Apakah salah seorang dari kami akan diberi pahala karena memuaskan nafsunya?" Beliau bersabda: "Tidakkah kamu lihat bahwa jika ia menempatkannya pada yang haram, bukankah akan ada dosa? Maka demikian pula jika ia menempatkannya pada yang halal, ada pahala."

471.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "Whoever among your servants is compatible with you — feed him from what you eat and clothe him from what you wear. Whoever is not compatible with you — sell him, but do not torment Allah's creation."
471.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Siapa pun dari pelayanmu yang cocok denganmu — berilah ia makan dari apa yang kamu makan dan pakaikan dari apa yang kamu kenakan. Siapa pun yang tidak cocok denganmu — jualah, tetapi jangan menyiksa makhluk Allah."

472.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said to him about various acts of charity, then said: "And in your intimate relations with your wife there is reward for you." Abu Dharr asked: "How can there be reward in my desire?" The Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "Do you not see that if you had a child who grew up and you hoped for his goodness — so too, if you lawfully fulfill your desire, you are rewarded."
472.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda kepadanya tentang berbagai macam sedekah, kemudian bersabda: "Dan dalam hubungan intimmu dengan istrimu ada pahala bagimu." Abu Dharr bertanya: "Bagaimana bisa ada pahala dalam nafsuku?" Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Tidakkah kamu lihat bahwa jika kamu memiliki seorang anak yang tumbuh besar dan kamu berharap pada kebaikannya — demikian pula jika kamu memenuhi nafsumu dengan cara yang halal, kamu diberi pahala."

473.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man saw him calling out to people from behind a mosque and asked what he was saying. He said: "I said nothing to them except something they had already heard from their Prophet دلوالله." He was asked about taking the stipend. Abu Dharr said: "Take it as long as it benefits you — but if you see that it is a trial for your religion, leave it."
473.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa seorang laki-laki melihatnya berseru kepada orang-orang dari belakang masjid dan bertanya apa yang ia katakan. Ia berkata: "Aku tidak mengatakan sesuatu kepada mereka kecuali sesuatu yang sudah mereka dengar dari Nabi mereka دلوالله." Ia ditanya tentang mengambil tunjangan. Abu Dharr berkata: "Ambillah selama bermanfaat bagimu — tetapi jika kamu melihatnya menjadi ujian bagi agamamu, tinggalkan."

474.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "O Messenger of Allah, is 'La ilaha illallah' among the good deeds?" He said: "It is the best of good deeds."
474.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia berkata: "Wahai Rasulullah, apakah 'La ilaha illallah' termasuk kebaikan?" Beliau bersabda: "Itu adalah sebaik-baik kebaikan."

475.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "Allah the Exalted says: 'Whoever does a good deed will have ten times its like or more. Whoever does an evil deed, its recompense is one like it, or I will forgive. Whoever meets Me with sins filling the earth but has not associated anything with Me, I will meet him with forgiveness filling the earth.'"
475.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Allah Yang Maha Tinggi berfirman: 'Barang siapa melakukan satu kebaikan akan mendapatkan sepuluh kali lipatnya atau lebih. Barang siapa melakukan satu keburukan, balasannya adalah satu seperti itu, atau Aku akan mengampuninya. Barang siapa menemui-Ku dengan dosa yang memenuhi bumi namun tidak menyekutukan-Ku dengan sesuatu pun, Aku akan menemui-Ku dengan ampunan yang memenuhi bumi.'"

476.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "The best things you can use to change grey hair are henna and indigo."
476.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Sebaik-baik yang dapat kalian gunakan untuk mengubah uban adalah henna dan indigo."

477.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "There will be rulers over you who delay the prayer from its proper times. If you encounter them, pray the prayer at its proper time at home, then come to them — and if you find they have already prayed, that will count for you as supererogatory. If you find they have not prayed, pray with them and it will be a supererogatory prayer for you."
477.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Akan ada penguasa atas kalian yang menunda shalat dari waktu-waktunya yang benar. Jika kamu menemui mereka, shalatlah pada waktunya yang benar di rumah, kemudian datanglah kepada mereka — jika kamu mendapati mereka sudah shalat, itu akan dihitung sebagai shalat sunnah bagimu. Jika kamu mendapati mereka belum shalat, shalatlah bersama mereka dan itu akan menjadi shalat sunnah bagimu."

478.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said: "The most wealthy will be the lowest on the Day of Resurrection, except those who give generously in every direction." Then he said: "By the One in Whose hand is my soul, no one among you dies leaving camels, cattle, or sheep whose zakat he has not paid, except they will come on the Day of Resurrection larger and fatter, and trample him."
478.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Orang yang paling kaya akan menjadi yang terendah pada Hari Kiamat, kecuali mereka yang berinfak dengan dermawan ke segala arah." Kemudian beliau bersabda: "Demi Dzat yang jiwaku berada di tangan-Nya, tidak seorang pun di antara kalian yang meninggal dengan meninggalkan unta, sapi, atau kambing yang tidak dibayarkan zakatnya, kecuali mereka akan datang pada Hari Kiamat lebih besar dan lebih gemuk, lalu menginjak-injak dia."

479.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله described a man who will be brought on the Day of Resurrection and all his deeds will be laid out before him. He will say: "O Lord, I committed those things." Then it will be said: "You also did this and that on such a day." He will say: "O Lord, I did things that I do not see listed here." The Messenger of Allah دلوالله laughed until his back teeth showed. Then it will be said: "For every evil deed you have a good deed to replace it."
479.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله menggambarkan seorang laki-laki yang akan dibawa pada Hari Kiamat dan semua amalnya akan dibeberkan di hadapannya. Ia akan berkata: "Wahai Tuhanku, aku melakukan hal-hal itu." Kemudian dikatakan: "Kamu juga melakukan ini dan itu pada hari ini dan itu." Ia berkata: "Wahai Tuhanku, aku melakukan hal-hal yang tidak aku lihat tercantum di sini." Rasulullah دلوالله tertawa hingga gigi gerahamnya terlihat. Kemudian dikatakan: "Untuk setiap keburukan kamu memiliki satu kebaikan sebagai penggantinya."

480.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said to him: "O Abu Dharr, raise your gaze and look at the lowest person you see in the mosque." He said: "I see a weak man in tattered clothing." The Prophet دلوالله said: "By the One in Whose hand is my soul, this man is better before Allah on the Day of Resurrection than a mountain of gold."
480.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda kepadanya: "Wahai Abu Dharr, angkat pandanganmu dan lihat orang paling rendah yang kamu lihat di masjid." Ia berkata: "Aku melihat seorang laki-laki yang lemah dengan pakaian compang-camping." Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Demi Dzat yang jiwaku berada di tangan-Nya, orang ini lebih baik di sisi Allah pada Hari Kiamat daripada gunung emas."

481.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said: "The most intense of my nation in love for me will be people who will come after me. One of them would wish to have given up his family and wealth just to have seen me."
481.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Yang paling kuat kecintaannya kepadaku dari umatku adalah orang-orang yang akan datang setelahku. Salah seorang dari mereka berharap bisa menyerahkan keluarga dan hartanya demi bisa melihatku."

482.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he asked the Prophet دلوالله about standing the whole night in prayer reciting a single verse. He said: "I prayed for my nation." He asked: "What answer did you receive?" He said: "I was answered with that which, if many of them were to come to know it, they would abandon the prayer." He said: "Shall I not give you glad tidings?" He said: "Yes." He said: "Whoever from my nation dies without associating anything with Allah will enter Paradise."
482.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Nabi دلوالله tentang berdiri sepanjang malam dalam shalat sambil membaca satu ayat. Beliau bersabda: "Aku berdoa untuk umatku." Ia bertanya: "Jawaban apa yang kamu terima?" Beliau bersabda: "Aku dijawab dengan sesuatu yang jika banyak dari mereka mengetahuinya, mereka akan meninggalkan shalat." Beliau bersabda: "Maukah aku memberikan kabar gembira kepadamu?" Ia berkata: "Ya." Beliau bersabda: "Barang siapa dari umatku meninggal tanpa menyekutukan sesuatu pun dengan Allah akan masuk surga."

483.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said that every horse prays at dawn: "O Allah, You entrusted me to one of the children of Adam — make me among the most beloved of his possessions to him."
483.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda bahwa setiap kuda berdoa saat fajar: "Ya Allah, Engkau mempercayakanku kepada salah satu putra Adam — jadikanlah aku di antara yang paling dicintai dari miliknya."

484.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that Masruq said: "I would have asked the Prophet دلوالله about whether Muhammad saw his Lord." Abu Dharr said: "I asked him and he said: 'Light — how could I see Him?'"
484.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Masruq berkata: "Aku ingin bertanya kepada Nabi دلوالله apakah Muhammad melihat Tuhannya." Abu Dharr berkata: "Aku menanyakannya dan beliau bersabda: 'Cahaya — bagaimana mungkin aku bisa melihat-Nya?'"

485.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he seized an opportunity to ask the Prophet دلوالله about Laylat al-Qadr. He said: "In which of the last ten nights is it?" The Prophet دلوالله said: "Seek it in the last ten nights — do not ask me anything after that." He continued speaking, then Abu Dharr asked again. He said: "In which of the seven last nights?" He said: "Do not ask me after this."
485.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia memanfaatkan kesempatan untuk bertanya kepada Nabi دلوالله tentang Lailatul Qadar. Ia berkata: "Di malam manakah dari sepuluh malam terakhir itu?" Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Carilah di sepuluh malam terakhir — jangan tanya aku lagi setelah itu." Beliau terus berbicara, kemudian Abu Dharr bertanya lagi. Ia berkata: "Di malam manakah dari tujuh malam terakhir?" Beliau bersabda: "Jangan tanya aku setelah ini."

486.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he asked the Messenger of Allah دلوالله about the best deed. He said: "Belief in Allah and jihad in His path." He asked: "Which freeing of slaves is best?" He said: "The most precious and most valued by its owner." He asked: "What if I cannot?" He said: "Help a craftsman or work for one who cannot work." He asked: "What if I cannot?" He said: "Withhold your harm from people, for that is a charity you give on behalf of yourself."
486.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Rasulullah دلوالله tentang amal terbaik. Beliau bersabda: "Iman kepada Allah dan jihad di jalan-Nya." Ia bertanya: "Membebaskan budak yang mana yang terbaik?" Beliau bersabda: "Yang paling berharga dan paling bernilai bagi pemiliknya." Ia bertanya: "Bagaimana jika aku tidak bisa?" Beliau bersabda: "Bantu seorang pengrajin atau bekerja untuk yang tidak bisa bekerja." Ia bertanya: "Bagaimana jika aku tidak bisa?" Beliau bersabda: "Tahanlah keburukanmu dari orang-orang, karena itu adalah sedekah yang kamu berikan atas nama dirimu sendiri."

487.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that when he arrived to Uthman from Syria, he said: "My close friend دلوالله commanded me with three things: listen and obey even if the leader is an Abyssinian slave; when you cook a broth, add extra water and share with your neighbors; and pray the prayer at its proper time."
487.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ketika ia tiba kepada Utsman dari Syam, ia berkata: "Kekasihku دلوالله memerintahkanku dengan tiga hal: dengar dan taatilah meskipun pemimpinnya adalah budak Habasyah; ketika kamu memasak kuah, tambahkan lebih banyak air dan bagikan kepada tetanggamu; dan shalatlah pada waktunya yang benar."

488.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "If a man drinks wine, it is obligatory upon Allah to give him to drink from the mud of al-Khabal." They asked: "O Messenger of Allah, what is the mud of al-Khabal?" He said: "The sweat of the people of Hell" — or he said: "the discharge of the people of Hell."
488.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Jika seseorang meminum khamr, maka wajib atas Allah untuk memberinya minum dari lumpur al-Khabal." Mereka bertanya: "Wahai Rasulullah, apa lumpur al-Khabal itu?" Beliau bersabda: "Keringat penghuni Neraka" — atau beliau bersabda: "cairan penghuni Neraka."

489.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was in a state of ritual impurity and Bilal gave the call to prayer. The Messenger of Allah دلوالله rose and performed ghusl covered by a garment, with Abu Dharr turned away. Then he led the prayer and stood for so long that Abu Dharr began to doze and his head would hit the wall.
489.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia dalam keadaan junub dan Bilal mengumandangkan adzan. Rasulullah دلوالله bangkit dan mandi dalam keadaan terselubung kain, dengan Abu Dharr membalikkan badan. Kemudian beliau memimpin shalat dan berdiri begitu lama sehingga Abu Dharr mulai mengantuk dan kepalanya mengetuk dinding.

490.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said to him: "Shall I not tell you of a treasure from the treasures of Paradise?" He said: "Yes." He said: "La hawla wa la quwwata illa billah (There is no power and no strength except with Allah)."
490.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda kepadanya: "Maukah aku beritahukan kepadamu tentang harta karun dari harta karun surga?" Ia berkata: "Ya." Beliau bersabda: "La hawla wa la quwwata illa billah (Tidak ada daya dan tidak ada kekuatan kecuali dengan Allah)."

491.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله reported from his Lord: "O son of Adam, as long as you call upon Me and hope in Me, I will forgive you whatever you have done. O son of Adam, if you meet Me with sins filling the earth but you have not associated anything with Me, I will meet you with forgiveness filling the earth. O son of Adam, if you do sins until they reach the clouds of the sky, then you ask My forgiveness, I will forgive you."
491.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله meriwayatkan dari Tuhannya: "Wahai putra Adam, selama kamu berdoa kepada-Ku dan berharap kepada-Ku, Aku akan mengampunimu atas apa yang telah kamu lakukan. Wahai putra Adam, jika kamu menemui-Ku dengan dosa yang memenuhi bumi namun tidak menyekutukan-Ku dengan sesuatu pun, Aku akan menemui-Ku dengan ampunan yang memenuhi bumi. Wahai putra Adam, jika kamu berbuat dosa hingga mencapai awan di langit, kemudian kamu memohon ampunan-Ku, Aku akan mengampunimu."

492.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said to Bilal: "O Bilal, do not call the adhan when the dawn appears as a rising light in the sky — that is not the dawn. The true dawn appears as a horizontal line." Then he called for his pre-dawn meal and took it. And he used to say: "My nation will remain well as long as they hasten the breaking of the fast and delay the pre-dawn meal."
492.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda kepada Bilal: "Wahai Bilal, jangan kumandangkan adzan ketika fajar muncul sebagai cahaya yang menjulang di langit — itu bukan fajar yang sebenarnya. Fajar yang benar tampak sebagai garis horizontal." Kemudian beliau meminta sahur dan memakannya. Dan beliau biasa berkata: "Umatku akan tetap dalam kebaikan selama mereka menyegerakan berbuka puasa dan menunda sahur."

493.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said: "Allah continues to face His servant in prayer as long as he does not turn away. When he turns his face away, Allah turns away from him."
493.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: "Allah terus menghadap kepada hamba-Nya dalam shalat selama ia tidak berpaling. Ketika ia memalingkan wajahnya, Allah pun berpaling darinya."

494.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah دلوالله said to him: "Would you not like to pledge allegiance to me in return for Paradise?" He said: "Yes," and extended his hand. The Prophet دلوالله stipulated: "That you do not ask people for anything." He agreed. He said: "And not even your whip if it falls — you must dismount and pick it up yourself."
494.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda kepadanya: "Maukah kamu berbai'at kepadaku dengan imbalan surga?" Ia berkata: "Ya," dan mengulurkan tangannya. Nabi دلوالله mensyaratkan: "Bahwa kamu tidak meminta sesuatu pun kepada orang lain." Ia setuju. Beliau bersabda: "Dan bahkan cemetai kamu jika jatuh — kamu harus turun dan mengambilnya sendiri."

495.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "On the twenty-sixth night the Prophet دلوالله did not say anything or stand for prayer. On the twenty-sixth day before Asr prayer he stood and said: 'We will stand tonight if Allah wills — meaning the twenty-seventh night — so whoever wishes to stand let him stand.' Abu Dharr said: "We steeled ourselves for the standing and he led us in prayer."
495.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia berkata: "Pada malam kedua puluh enam Nabi دلوالله tidak berkata apa pun dan tidak berdiri untuk shalat. Pada siang kedua puluh enam sebelum shalat Ashar beliau berdiri dan berkata: 'Kami akan berdiri malam ini jika Allah menghendaki — yakni malam kedua puluh tujuh — maka barang siapa ingin berdiri hendaklah ia berdiri.' Abu Dharr berkata: "Kami menguatkan diri untuk shalat dan beliau memimpin kami shalat."

496.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he saw two animals butting each other and one of them caused the other to miscarry. The Messenger of Allah دلوالله laughed. When asked why he was laughing, he said: "I am amazed. By the One in Whose hand is my soul, they will have justice served between them on the Day of Resurrection."
496.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia melihat dua ekor hewan yang saling bertanduk dan salah satunya menyebabkan yang lain keguguran. Rasulullah دلوالله tertawa. Ketika ditanya mengapa beliau tertawa, beliau bersabda: "Aku takjub. Demi Dzat yang jiwaku berada di tangan-Nya, keadilan akan ditegakkan di antara mereka pada Hari Kiamat."

497.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said: "Whoever says in the evening 'Allahu Akbar' (three times), 'Subhan Allah wa bihamdih' (three times), 'La ilaha illallah wa allahu akbar' (three times), 'La hawla wa la quwwata illa billah' (three times) — even if his sins were like the foam of the sea, they would be erased."
497.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Barang siapa mengucapkan di malam hari 'Allahu Akbar' (tiga kali), 'Subhanallah wa bihamdih' (tiga kali), 'La ilaha illallah wallahu akbar' (tiga kali), 'La hawla wa la quwwata illa billah' (tiga kali) — meskipun dosanya seperti buih laut, dosa-dosa itu akan terhapus."

498.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he spent the night until morning with the Messenger of Allah دلوالله and said to him: "Command me." He said: "Leadership is a trust and it will be regret and humiliation on the Day of Resurrection — except for one who takes it with its right and fulfills what is due in it."
498.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia menghabiskan malam hingga pagi bersama Rasulullah دلوالله dan berkata kepadanya: "Perintahkanlah aku." Beliau bersabda: "Kepemimpinan adalah amanah dan akan menjadi penyesalan dan kehinaan pada Hari Kiamat — kecuali bagi orang yang mengambilnya dengan haknya dan memenuhi apa yang wajib di dalamnya."

499.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "I heard the Messenger of Allah دلوالله say: 'When one of you loves his companion, let him go to his house and inform him that he loves him for the sake of Allah the Exalted.'"
499.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku mendengar Rasulullah دلوالله bersabda: 'Jika salah seorang dari kalian mencintai temannya, hendaklah ia pergi ke rumahnya dan memberitahunya bahwa ia mencintainya karena Allah Yang Maha Tinggi.'"

500.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet دلوالله said: "Whoever among your servants is compatible with you — feed him from what you eat and clothe him from what you wear. Whoever is not compatible with you — sell him but do not torment Allah's creation."
500.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Dharr (radhiyallahu ʾanha) bahwa Nabi دلوالله bersabda: "Siapa pun dari pelayanmu yang cocok denganmu — berilah ia makan dari apa yang kamu makan dan pakaikan dari apa yang kamu kenakan. Siapa pun yang tidak cocok denganmu — jualah, tetapi jangan menyiksa makhluk Allah."
